case_title: ALICE WU ET AL VS. MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $370.54. SERVED APR-19-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY WU, ALICE HAGAN, MICHAEL K MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, ALICE HAGAN, MICHAEL K IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM IS PROPERLY AGAINST THE OTHER PROPERTY OWNERS, AND NOT THIS DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,599.36 FILED BY WU, ALICE HAGAN, MICHAEL K AS TO DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHEAL HEAVEY, OWNER FILED BY DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIM LYNN. PLAINTIFF ALICE WU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL HAGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MICHAEL HEAVEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL HEAVEY, OWNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES ANY SERVICE ISSUES. STIPULATION ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
